rows.finalText: Around "What is the next right step in my calling", the reading gathers most strongly around purpose / calling, with a right path emphasis. The Ring in Past sets the tone with commitment clarity stabilizes momentum. When Ring appears here, it pulls your calling toward agreements, repetition, mutual terms, and what keeps returning until it is consciously renewed or revised.
